[3] (ii) Given that the area of regionR_{1} is 30 cm^{2}, find theareaofregionR_{2}, correctto3 significant

questions.question_text: 10 The function f is defined by f : x →2x^{2}-12x + 13 for 0 ≤ x ≤ A, where A is a constant. (i) Express f(x) in the form a(x + b)^{2} + c, where a, b and c are constants. [3] (ii) State the value of A for which the graph of y = f(x) has a line of symmetry. [1] (iii) When A has this value, find the range of f. [2] The function g is defined by g : x →2x^{2}-12x + 13 for x ≥ 4. (iv) Explain why g has an inverse. [1] (v) Obtain an expression, in terms of x, for g^{-}1(x). [3]
